      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  ShadowViewGraphics2D
      Implementation of a graphics context which is delagating to another graphics context but by forcing the shadow drawing parameters.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Create a ViewGraphics2D that is delegating to the given VectorGraphics2D.

      Create a ViewGraphics2D that is delegating to the given VectorGraphics2D.

      Create a ViewGraphics2D that is delegating to the given VectorGraphics2D.

      Constructors in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.graphics with parameters of type ViewGraphics2D 
      Constructor and Description
      ShadowViewGraphics2D(ViewGraphics2D context)
      Create a Graphics that is drawing the shadows with a color darker than the current background}.
      ShadowViewGraphics2D(ViewGraphics2D context, Color shadowColor)
      Create a Graphics that is drawing the shadows with the color specified by the parameter shadowColor.

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.io.eps that implement ViewGraphics2D 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  EpsGraphics2D
      This graphic context permits to create an Encapsulated Postscript file from a graphic context.
      class  EpsTeXGraphics2D
      This graphic context permits to create a EPS file with combined TeX macros, from a graphic context.

      This graphic context permits to create a PDF file from a graphic context.

    • Uses of ViewGraphics2D in org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.graphics

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.graphics that implement ViewGraphics2D 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  DelegatedViewGraphics2D
      This is the implementation of a ViewGraphics2D which is delegating to an existing VectorGraphics2D.
      class  SwingViewGraphics2D
      This is the swing-based implementation of a ViewGraphics2D.
      class  TransparentViewGraphics2D
      Implementation of a graphics context which is delagating to another graphics context but by forcing the transparency drawing parameters.
